title: Tool Trims x Enderite Mod
body:
This is a small datapack with the goal to add compatibility between the following mods:
- [Trims on Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/trims-on-tools)
- [Enderite Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderite-mod)

The "Trims on Tools" mod allows to use the armor trimming mechanic on tools.
The "Enderite Mod" adds a new material, the enderite, and with it a new set of tools and armor.

Currently, this datapack allows the enderite tools to be trimmed by "Trims on Tools" like the vanilla ones.
**Currently, this datapack does NOT allow tools to BE TRIMMED with enderite; I will work on that in the future.**

![An enderite axe being trimmed at a smithing table, using the "Tide" trim template and gold as the material](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4576b418ba85113dc767f6cd36a78d4d9d21175.png)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Remember: as this is a DATAPACK, installing it from Modrinth will only add it in a folder named "datapacks" under the installation directory. You will have to then copy it from that folder into the "datapacks" folder of the world every time you create one. Don't worry if you forget to do that when you create the world: you can add and remove the datapack at any point and it should be fine.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you, like me, like to build your own modpacks, you will almost always find some gaps like this between the mods you installed. This datapack aims to fill one of this gaps.
